collateral_recheck.agent_statement: The recommendation and evidence summary consistently identify South at $95,000 annually, and both original vendor rows and their control statuses remain present.

criterion_local_recheck.agent_statement: South and North both meet all required controls; South's $95,000 annual cost is lower than North's $120,000 annual cost, so South is the lowest-cost qualifying vendor.

defect_observation: The recommendation selected North at $120,000 even though the evidence showed that South also met all required controls and cost less at $95,000.
diagnosis: The named recommendation contradicted the stated decision criterion and the evidence summary because it did not select the lowest-cost qualifying vendor.

new_error_assessment.agent_statement: No new inconsistency, unsupported vendor claim, omitted evidence row, or cost mismatch was introduced; the memo remains within the supplied internal-calibration evidence boundary.
new_error_assessment.deterministic_scope: Only planted endpoint and declared collateral are checked.

revision_delta.agent_statement: Changed the recommendation from North at $120,000 to South at $95,000, added the qualifying rationale, retained both vendor rows, and aligned the evidence-summary conclusion with the recommendation.
unified_diff: +Select **South** at an annual cost of **$95,000**. Both vendors meet all required controls, and South is the lowest-cost qualifying option.
| Vendor | Annual cost | Required controls met |
-South is the lower-cost qualifying option, so the evidence does not support the recommendation above.
+South is the lowest-cost vendor among those meeting all required controls, at **$95,000 annually**.
